title: Build Your Knowledge Base
titleLarge: Upload everything your workers need to know
shortDesc: Upload employee handbooks, SOPs, training docs, and even audio recordings. Sidekick learns it all instantly.

title: Get Your Location Code
titleLarge: One simple code connects your entire team
shortDesc: Each location gets a unique code. Share it with workers—that's all they need to get started.

title: Workers Text & Ask
titleLarge: No app, no training, no friction
shortDesc: Workers text the code to join, then ask questions in any language via text or voice memo. Instant answers 24/7.

title: Track & Improve
titleLarge: See what's working and what's missing
shortDesc: Your dashboard shows trending questions, knowledge gaps, and AI-suggested improvements to your training materials.
